creator: cramerj@intel.com
text: Unfortunately, this is one of those "void your warranty"-type scenarios.  With the hardware development and testing we've done, it was deemed that we are unable to support cables with the Infiniband Compliance Codes (as in the document you provided).  And while your patch may work for your setup, it's still an unsupported configuration.  If you were to purchase cables with 10G Ethernet Compliance Codes, we would of course provide support for that.
